message:
feat(app,remote,runtime): extend application layer, remote subsystem, and task handle

- app.rs: application-level refinements for runtime integration
- channel/oneshot.rs: continued oneshot channel improvements
- remote.rs: remote communication subsystem updates
- runtime/task_handle.rs: task handle lifecycle extensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
